since_last: 38% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.89%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.09% · BTC -0.99% · Gold +1.69% · Nasdaq100 -0.30%. 38% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.89%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.89%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -3.55%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +21.12%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +21.12%, DELL +9.63%, NRG +5.07%, CEG +4.72%, CRNC +3.47%. Laggards: PATH -12.08%, GEV -8.07%, PLTR -6.37%, AI -6.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.81% at $116.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.81% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
